summary: Completed frontend testing of Producer Dashboard fixes. Both issues verified as FIXED: 1) Producer Dashboard no longer shows blank page - shows proper loading state and access denied message when not authenticated, 2) Image upload UI improved with new Upload button and (0/3) count indicator replacing old URL input.
passed_tests: Producer Dashboard loads correctly on /producer route - SUCCESS
Producer Dashboard does NOT show blank page - shows 'Access denied. Producer account required.' with 'Go to Login' link when not authenticated
Producer Dashboard shows Stripe Connect section with 'Connect Stripe Account' button - SUCCESS
Producer Products page loads at /producer/products - SUCCESS
Create Product form shows new image upload UI with Upload button - SUCCESS
Image upload shows (0/3) count indicator - SUCCESS
Supported formats text visible: 'Supported: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF (max 5MB each)' - SUCCESS
Old 'Image URL' input field removed - SUCCESS
Sidebar navigation with data-testid attributes working - SUCCESS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Producer Dashboard fixes verified. ProducerLayout.js now has proper loading state (line 54-64) and role check (line 66-78) that prevents blank page. ProducerProducts.js has new ImageUploader component (line 17-153) with file upload functionality replacing old URL input. All producer subroutes working correctly.

producer_dashboard_blank_page_fix.details: ProducerLayout.js now shows loading spinner while auth is being checked, then shows 'Access denied' message with 'Go to Login' link if user is not authenticated or not a producer

image_upload_ui_improvement.details: New ImageUploader component with: Upload button (dashed border box), (0/3) count indicator, supported formats text, file validation (5MB max, image types only), removes old URL input field

stripe_connect_section.details: Shows 'Stripe not connected' warning with 'Connect Stripe Account' button. API may fail with test key but UI renders correctly

producer_subroutes./producer: Overview page with stats and quick actions
producer_subroutes./producer/products: Products list with Create Product button
